case_title: LOPEZ, ARMANDO VS SANTAMARIA, CARLA J.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-18-1994, GRANTED
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ARMANDO
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ARMANDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANTAMARIA, CARLA J.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SANTAMARIA, CARLA J. HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ARMANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTAMARIA, CARLA J. $648.20 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $683.20, PLFT 30% CONTRIBUTORY NEGLIGENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, ARMANDO AS TO DEFENDANT SANTAMARIA, CARLA J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SANTAMARIA, CARLA J.
